The '''''Anuti''''' was a [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transport]] that was part of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It saw service in the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]].

==History==
When the decision was made to construct a Rebel shipyard in [[Airam (group)|Airam]] space, ''Anuti'' and its sister-ship ''[[Anuto]]'' were part of a convoy sent with the needed supplies and personnel. ''Anuti'' itself bore the construction workers who would assemble the shipyard. Intercepted in the [[Rocrin system/Legends|Rocrin system]] by ships from Imperial [[Task Force Vengeance]], it was destroyed together with the rest of the convoy.

{{Ship-stub}}
